non_blocking_notes: `git diff --check main...HEAD` passed, aside from readonly sandbox `xcrun` cache warnings.
Full writable proof matrix (`npm run check`, `npm test`, `npm run test:e2e`, `npm run build`) was not run in this read-only Gate 4 sandbox; Gate 5/CI must still run it before merge.
Diff secret scan found only env names and test placeholders such as `test-secret`/`tok-*`; no real secrets were found.
No diff-added member-facing em/en dashes were found in changed `src`/`convex` source; the only dash match was in README docs.

spec_compliance.criterion: A - Events lane, RSVP, waitlist, check-in, pass, and notification invariants.
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/events.ts` applies `laneSeesEvent` on list/detail/RSVP/pass/my-events, with `restricted_unknown` seeing no events. RSVP enforces active lifecycle, capacity, priority windows, and cancellation promotion; `promoteEarliestWaitlisted` re-checks capacity, lifecycle, lane, and standing before promoting. `convex/admin/events.ts` locks live audience/time/capacity invariants, notifies cancel/postpone holders, and `checkIn` accepts only seated rows (`registered`, `attended`, `no_show`). `src/admin/views/EventRegistrationsView.tsx` hides check-in controls for waitlisted/cancelled rows.

spec_compliance.criterion: B - Opportunities board, applications, own-history ruling, and result eligibility.
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/opportunities.ts` gates the board/detail/apply path to active standard/ally members, applies women-only vs open audience rules, rejects evergreen and late applications, enforces one application per member/opportunity, and keeps `myApplications` available for the member's own history regardless current lane. `src/portal/views/OpportunitiesView.tsx` renders locked lanes as history-only. `convex/admin/opportunities.ts` freezes audience once open and re-checks current lane/audience before recording a win.

spec_compliance.criterion: D/E/F/H - Directory privacy, notifications, member-admin contact reveal, admin roles, and aggregate reports.
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/directory.ts` blocks minor/restricted viewers and returns only directory-tier fields, with no email, mobile, DOB, gender, or bio. `convex/notifications.ts` resolves the caller from auth and reads/marks only her own rows. `convex/admin/members.ts` masks dossier contact and member audit actors; raw contact only returns through audited `revealMemberContact`. Certificate admin and platform health use `requireSuperAdmin`; operational admin/report queries use `requireAdmin` and return aggregate counts/groups rather than member rows.

spec_compliance.criterion: Under-18 and restricted_unknown safeguards from the vault.
spec_compliance.evidence: Join/claim paths require or validate DOB, hold minors at `pending_guardian`, block/suppress under-18 migrated claims, strip mentorship options for protected lanes, and force non-standard pipeline consent false with audit. Guardian confirmation is tokened, hashed, expiring, and requires an explicit guardian button press; admin can resend but cannot confirm. Minor/restricted lanes are server-blocked from adult events, opportunities, directory, and pipeline.

spec_compliance.criterion: Input validation, secrets, audit trail, and member-facing brand locks.
spec_compliance.evidence: Changed server boundaries validate free-text lengths, emails, HTTPS URLs, uploaded photo/logo MIME and size, Turnstile/rate-limit ordering, state transitions, and ownership. Member-affecting writes reviewed write audit rows with PII-light summaries. Diff scans found no real secrets and no diff-added member-facing em/en dashes in changed source.

summary: No ship-blocking authorization, safeguarding, input-validation, data-leakage, audit-trail, or spec-delivery gaps were found in the current diff against `main`.
